low_risk.name: Low Risk
low_risk.subtitle: Conservative Long-Only
low_risk.description: Zero-stop strategies — only trades that historically never dipped past 3%. Long positions only with 3% stop-loss protection.

medium_risk.name: Medium Risk
medium_risk.subtitle: Balanced Long-Only
medium_risk.description: Minimum drawdown portfolio — optimized for lowest average equity drawdown. Long positions only with 3% stop-loss.

high_risk.name: High Risk
high_risk.subtitle: Aggressive Daily-Predict
high_risk.description: Same strategies but XGBoost predicts every trading day. More signals, higher return potential, higher volatility.
